LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS TATYANA YUROVSKY AND LEV YUROVSKY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE FACTUAL ISSUES AS TO THE PROPER CHARACTERIZATION OF THIS AGREEMENT THAT WILL NEED TO BE RESOLVED BY A TRIER OF FACT BEFORE THE COURT CAN PROPERLY INTERPRET THE AGREEMENT. AS TO THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO 2,3,4,5,6,10,11,12,14,15 AND 18. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 1,7,8,9,13,16 AND 17 BASED ON THE COURT'S TENTATIVE AND THE WITHDRAWAL OF THE MOTION AS TO CERTAIN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES TODAY. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. PAUL F. UTRECHT AND ANDREW M. ZACKS OF ZACKS, UTRECHT & LEADBETTER, TEL. NO. 956-8100 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS' AND MOVING PARTIES;
ATTY. RAQUEL FOX OF THE TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, TEL. NO. 771-9850 X 115 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFFS' TATYANA YUROVSKY AND LEV YUROVSKY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION- MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE FACTUAL ISSUES AS TO THE PROPER CHARACTERIZATION OF THIS AGREEMENT THAT WILL NEED TO BE RESOLVED BY A TRIER OF FACT BEFORE THE COURT CAN PROPERLY INTERPRET THE AGREEMENT. AS TO THE AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO 2,3,4,5,6,10,11,12,14,15 AND 18. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED AS TO AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES 1,7,8,9,13,16 AND 17 BASED ON THE COURT'S TENTATIVE AND THE WITHDRAWAL OF THE MOTION AS TO CERTIN AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES TODAY. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 - =301/PJB/PM
